lore.goal: Escape the dungeon and reunite with Tiltelle
lore.ken: Ken Jennings — dungeon advisor; explains mechanics in a calm game-show host voice
lore.troll: The Troll — antagonist on the right; taunts Tilty, especially when time runs low

levels.title: First Tilt
levels.subtitle: Learn to move the table
levels.feature: No painted path — just gray stone, cyan start, magenta freedom, and one blue tile that rises when you play.
rules: Roll the ball onto cyan — that's your cell door.
Tilt the table to reach magenta across the open floor.
When play starts, the blinking blue tile rises so you can roll over it.
levels.kenLine: Category: TABLE CONTROL. Gray is open floor — the ball rolls anywhere flat. Tilt to magenta.
levels.trollLine: Can't even tilt a table? Tiltelle's not impressed.

levels.title: Dungeon Digest
levels.subtitle: Everything the Troll hid in the walls
levels.feature: Serpentine ochre path through green walls — plus pits, blue bonuses, rising gates, and traps that blink red before they drop.
rules: Stay on the ochre path — green tiles are raised walls.
Red pits are recessed — avoid them or your run restarts.
Blue tiles are bonus markers; green gates cycle up and down.
Blinking red path tiles will recess — roll past before they drop.
Clear both gauntlet chambers to earn your name on the board.
levels.kenLine: Final exam: ochre lane only. Green blocks, red drops. No shortcuts off-path.
levels.trollLine: I packed every trick into one chamber. Enjoy the pit choir!

levels.title: Pit of Regret
levels.subtitle: One wrong tilt and you fall
levels.feature: Red pits yawn open beneath the path. Practice your pit avoidance without the moving parts.
rules: Red pits are recessed — the ball drops and your run restarts.
Feather the table; don't rush past a pit lip.
Practice mode only — sharpen your reflexes here.
levels.kenLine: Red means recessed hazard — sunk below the ball. Stay on ochre; the lava rim is real.
levels.trollLine: Tiltelle can't hear you down there, Tilty. Neither can Ken!

levels.title: Trapdoor Tango
levels.subtitle: The floor won't stay still
levels.feature: Green bridge tiles slam down on a timer. Cross while they're flush or wait for the next beat.
rules: Watch green gates — they alternate between wall and open path.
Time your roll through the opening; hesitation invites the Troll's laughter.
Dynamic tiles keep moving until you reach magenta.
levels.kenLine: Timing puzzle! Green gates cycle every few seconds — roll on the ochre beat.
levels.trollLine: Dance, little prisoner! The floor drops when I say so.

levels.title: Ken's Bonus Round
levels.subtitle: Daily Double on the table
levels.feature: Crystal spurs branch off the ochre spine — peel away for bonus tiles, then rejoin the escape route.
rules: Follow the ochre column; when a spur opens, that's your optional detour.
Blue tiles are bonus markers — roll through them, then back to ochre.
You still must reach magenta; crystals won't save a tardy escape.
Practice mode only beyond the gauntlet — show off here.
levels.kenLine: See that blue spur off the ochre path? Optional detour for points — spine first, sparkle second.
levels.trollLine: Detour all you want, Tilty. Every second on a crystal is a second Tiltelle waits.

levels.title: Tiltelle's Threshold
levels.subtitle: One last door home
levels.feature: Walls, pits, and blue hope collide at the final gate. Tiltelle waits just past magenta.
rules: Everything you learned returns: walls, pits, bonus tiles.
The serpentine climb is long — conserve your nerves.
Reach magenta and the dungeon loses its grip on Tilty forever.
levels.kenLine: Final exam: walls, pits, and blue bonuses. Gray shortcuts don't exist — stay on ochre.
levels.trollLine: This is where your story ends, Tilty. I'll take good care of Tiltelle.

levels.title: Floor is Lava
levels.subtitle: Outrun the spreading heat
levels.feature: Every tile starts flat gray stone. Tiles you touch heat up ochre, blink red, then sink into lava behind you — keep rolling until the survival clock hits zero.
rules: All tiles begin as open floor — roll anywhere.
Tiles you touch turn ochre, then blink red, then sink — even after you leave.
Survive until the countdown reaches zero — no magenta finish line.
Each new tile you touch adds bonus points; more movement means more risk.
levels.kenLine: Tiles you touch heat up and fall behind you — keep moving!
levels.trollLine: Every step leaves a trap, Tilty. The floor eats your path!
